subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God who art attracted! Thy letter was received, and from its contents thy firmness in the Covenant was clear and evident [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله المنجذبه نامه شما رسید و از مضمون ثبوت بر میثاق واضح و مشهود بود
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @personal instructions, @Shrines and Holy places, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause, @martyrs and martyrdom, @firmness in the Covenant
